description_long: This is a lifelike representation of a mature deer, featuring a robust, muscular body covered in a gradient of brown hues with a lighter, almost grayish patch around the neck and chest. Its most striking feature is a large, intricate set of antlers with multiple tines, colored in shades of tan and gold, giving it a majestic appearance. The deer has a short, slender tail and four visible, well-defined black hooves. Its head is elongated with a dark snout, expressive eyes, and pointed ears that stand upright. The surface appears smooth with a matte finish, mimicking the look of fur but without visible texture detail. This object is sized and proportioned realistically, suitable for placement in urban parks or naturalistic street scenes.
description: A realistic, brown deer with large, branching antlers, pointed ears, and a smooth, matte surface. The body is robust and lifelike, with a short tail and black hooves.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical antlers, pointed ears, and the full face with a dark snout and chest patch.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the body, the curvature of the antlers, and the slender tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, hind legs, and the short tail, with antlers visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the body profile, antlers, and tail from the opposite side.
